name: smtpforai-skills
description: Skills for sending email via the SmtpForAI command-line tool, plus an MCP server interface (same exe, `mcp` subcommand).

skills.name: send-email
skills.description: Send an email over SMTP via the SmtpForAI CLI, with a recipient allowlist and per-message limits.

mcpServers.name: smtpforai
mcpServers.description: MCP server exposing send_email, validate_recipient, and get_config_status. Same allowlist/limits as the CLI.
